message:
Add comprehensive CLI end-to-end test suite

- Discovery flow: list, list with filters, search, show, show error
- Suggestion flow: suggest prompts for a task
- Category & tag commands: list categories, list tags
- Bundle flow: list bundles, show bundle details
- Help & documentation: help --json, about --json
- JSON schema stability: verify stable schemas for agent integration
- Export flow: export to file, export to stdout

18 tests with 102 assertions covering full user journeys.
Tests use detailed logging (E2E_VERBOSE=1) for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
